message:
feat(tests): add cross-platform normalization for conformance tests

Add cross-platform output normalization to NormalizationRules:

- Path separator normalization: Windows backslash (\) → Unix forward slash (/)
- Line ending normalization: CRLF → LF for all string values
- Configurable path_fields to specify which fields contain file paths
- New cross_platform() constructor for path+line-ending-only normalization
- Updated conformance_default() to include cross-platform normalization

8 new unit tests verify:
- Path separator normalization on path fields only
- Line ending normalization on all string values
- Nested JSON structure handling
- Constructor defaults validation
- Integration with existing normalization features

Closes: beads_rust-lsht

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
